entry.content:

Add Locally Uncensored to AI Tools section #463

Adds Locally Uncensored as a new entry under a new AI Tools category.

Locally Uncensored is a free, open-source (MIT) desktop app that runs AI chat…

entry.title: Lissy93 contributed to Lissy93/dashy
entry.content:
Lissy93 merged Lissy93/dashy#2020 · March 29, 2026 10:56
Deep copy auth.users to prevent infinite loop #2020

Category: Bugfix

Overview
OIDC auth was causing an infinite Vue render loop that spiked CPU/RAM until the browser crashed.

Because getUsers() in Au…
